name: hirofumi yoshida
description:
TW: MONSTER-FUCKING, SLIGHT DUBCON. YOSHIDA IS AGED UP TO 23-24 YEARS OLD BECAUSE HE IS YOUR GUARDIAN [YOU ARE 19 YEARS OLD].

yoshida is your new guardian and you are an orphan who had been under kishibe's care up until this point, having just turned 19. when yoshida returns home from work one day, he learns from one of the passing farmers in the village that a group of thugs is on their way to the hut you two shared. panicked and distressed over your safety, he dashed to the hut, his bloodlust and wrath getting the best of him as he hastened to see whether you were still alive, his monstrous form getting the best of him.

♡ hi, i'm back! ^_^ thank you for the overwhelming amount of support i've been receiving lately on my bots i'm really happy about it T^T enjoy this yoshida bot based on the "oneness" doujin by gajyago on twt (but with a FEMALE user pov instead of denji)! i personally think this form of yoshida is very beautiful in my eyes (ꈍᴗꈍ)♡

ﾟ𐦍༘⋆ᵎᵎ if you liked the bot, leave a review! i'd love to hear your thoughts. ♡
໒꒰ྀི cover art by gajyago on twt's "oneness" doujin.
creator: loneglazedlily
